g.text: Zones A to C – MRI Entrance 1
Zones D to F – MRI Entrance 2
Zones G and H – Manchester Royal Eye Hospital Entrance
Zones J and K – Saint Mary’s Hospital Entrance
Zones L to N – Royal Manchester Children’s Hospital Entrance
Zones A to F – Grafton Street Multi-Storey Car Park
Zones G, H, J and K are are the same distance away from both multi-storey car parks
Zones L to N – Hathersage Road Multi-Storey Car Park
Blue Badge Parking is located outside RMCH, MREH and SMH and in both multi-storey car parks
Drop off points are located outside each Hospital Entrance (on the boulevard)
